_meta.note: Party/BuzzFeed tone · curly apostrophes only · glossary locked · Korean-specific items localized to universal equivalents

title_001: Finger Folds · the finger game that brings two people closer 🖐
meta_001: Finger Folds, played side by side. With 100 ready-made questions, make-your-own, and pick-from-four, get closer to friends, partners and family.
html_001: T W O · G E T T I N G · C L O S E R
html_003: Sit side by side and hold up five fingers.
html_004: Fold them honestly, and you’ll be closer before you know it.
html_009: if it’s you, fold a finger
html_025: If it’s you, fold a finger 🤫
html_034: Draw the next question above · you can move on without tapping
html_036: First to fold all five fingers.
html_037: Which means the most honest today!
html_043: Choose one of four for this round!
html_046: Keep it a short ‘…’ line and it flows best.
attr_006: e.g. Grateful to this person today

folded all five fingers first.
Which means they were the most honest today 💗
